nodes.context: Organized crime network in Europe, controls Russian-speaking and Georgian mafia groups.
One of two major criminal clans of the Georgian mafia, based in western Georgia.
One of two major criminal clans of the Georgian mafia, based in Tbilisi.
Italian organized crime group; parallels Georgian mafia in rules.
Georgian paramilitary militia led by former thief-in-law Jaba Ioseliani.
Georgian paramilitary militia led by ex-convict Tengiz Kitovani.
Crime syndicate in Georgia, co-founded by Davit Radiani.

edges.evidence_quote: The Georgian mafia has two major criminal clans from Tbilisi and Kutaisi.
edges.context: Kutaisi Clan is a major criminal clan within the Georgian mafia.

edges.evidence_quote: The Georgian mafia has two major criminal clans from Tbilisi and Kutaisi.
edges.context: Tbilisi Clan is a major criminal clan within the Georgian mafia.

edges.evidence_quote: In many of its rules or "laws", the Georgian mafia parallels the Sicilian Mafia.
edges.context: Georgian mafia parallels Sicilian Mafia in rules or laws.

edges.evidence_quote: the Georgian underworld in Russia, Georgia and elsewhere has been characterized by a violent feud between the Kutaisi and Tbilisi clans, led by Tariel Oniani and Aslan Usoyan, respectively.
edges.context: Kutaisi and Tbilisi clans are in a violent feud.

edges.evidence_quote: the Mkhedrioni led by former thief-in-law Jaba Ioseliani
edges.context: Mkhedrioni was led by a former thief-in-law, indicating ties to Georgian mafia.
